name: Video Editing AI MCP
description: AI-powered video editing toolkit: scene splitting, subtitle generation, thumbnail planning, color grading, and aspect ratio conversion. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: split_scenes
tools.description: Analyze video metadata and produce scene split points with timestamps

tools.name: generate_subtitles
tools.description: Generate timed subtitles (SRT format) from a transcript. Automatically

tools.name: thumbnail_data
tools.description: Generate thumbnail selection recommendations including best timestamps,

tools.name: recommend_color_grading
tools.description: Recommend color grading settings based on genre, mood, and lighting

tools.name: convert_aspect_ratio
tools.description: Plan an aspect ratio conversion with detailed crop/pad calculations,
